info.english_meaning: to accomplish to attain to fulfill  to achieve
info.hindI_arTa: sidDa karanA jaya pAnA sADanA karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'kzipraM saMsADyatAM kaMsa: keSo ca turagADamaH' (hari0 21972) saMsADyatAm=hanyatAm
'ayamAtmaBavaH Soko mAmanATamacetanam saMsADayati vegena yaTA kUlaM nadIrayaH' (rA0 26474).. saMsADayati=nASayati
'kecidagnimaTotpAdya saMsADya ca vanecarAH Bakzayanti sma mAMsAni' (BA0 Adi0 6928).. agninA saMsADya=agninA saMskftya
